function.name: change_detection
function.description: Detect and quantify changes between two time periods in a dataset. Analyzes statistical differences, spatial change patterns, and significance of changes over time.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to analyze for changes (e.g., 'SWOT November 2024', 'ICESat-2 freeboard')

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to analyze (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean', 'current view'). Defaults to current view if not specified.

before_time.description: Start time for 'before' period in ISO format (e.g., '2024-01-01'). Defaults to '2024-01-01'.

after_time.description: End time for 'after' period in ISO format (e.g., '2024-12-01'). Defaults to '2024-12-01'.

visualize.description: Whether to highlight change area on map with color indicating increase/decrease (default true)

ui.title: Change Detection Analysis
ui.details: Analyzing temporal changes and quantifying differences between time periods
